programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Opening night of Nadja's vampire nightclub is threatened when the big musical guest cancels.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires take a trip to the secret Night Market, where all the supernatural creatures gather to barter and haggle.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires endure the private school admissions interview process.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Nandor and Laszlo air out their differences on a hunting trip at an isolated cabin, Nadja has a girls' night, and Guillermo reconnects with his family for the first time in 12 years.

programme.desc: The mansion gets a makeover.

programme.desc: Guillermo has a visitor from overseas.

What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires return from their world travels to find their mansion on the verge of collapse, and a freakish new creature in the house.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Guillermo loses his mind trying to help Nandor plan the perfect vampire wedding.

programme.desc: Coverage of a local water main break brings unwanted attention to the vampires.

programme.desc: Nadja gives back to her community. Laszlo's experiments have some unexpected results.

programme.desc: Guillermo gets a new job and Colin helps Laszlo make a new friend.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo and Colin help neighbour Sean find a new job at the railroad at which they claim to work.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: The vampires are sent on a mission to New Hampshire to retrieve Nandor, who has lost his mind.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo's father's ghost returns to make amends; Nadja and Nandor deal with the shapeshifters who have moved in next door.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Laszlo and Nandor try to exorcise the demon who had possessed their neighbour Sean.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows

AFL: Gold Coast v Sydney
programme.desc: After 2 straight losses, the Swans will be desperate to get their season back on track when they head north to take on the Suns.

programme.title: AFL: Hawthorn v West Coast
programme.desc: After going down in one of the games of the season on Easter Monday, the Hawks meet the winless Eagles at Marvel Stadium.

programme.title: AFL Biggest Upsets: 1970 GF COL v CAR
programme.desc: Victory is sweet at the best of times but especially when it's against the odds, take a look at Fox Footy's biggest AFL upsets.

programme.title: AFLW: Carlton v Collingwood
programme.desc: Historic rivals Carlton and Collingwood will open the AFLW's 10th season on Thursday night at IKON Park in a repeat of the iconic inaugural match in 2017.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Shon Winegardner discovers why he got such a good deal on the mansion he just bought, and a family uncover a spooky basement room and in the process unleash a terrifying entity.

programme.title: Forged in Fire
programme.desc: Judges Ben Abbott, J. Neilson and David Baker are thrown into the fire for a gruelling home forge battle against each other.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: With loads needed to be hauled for their half million dollar contract, VP bosses Hugh Rowland and Vlad 'The Mad Russian' Pleskot agree to keep struggling new hire Art Burke aboard.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's the last fishing trip of the year. Christmas is just days away, as Andrew begins the final week of this deckhand trial on board Captain Frosti's Valdimar.

programme.title: Paranormal Survivor
programme.desc: Shon Winegardner discovers why he got such a good deal on the mansion he just bought, and a family uncover a spooky basement room and in the process unleash a terrifying entity.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Judi Love is left bewildered by the prospect of high-fiving Alex Horne, and Bridget Christie has a present for the Taskmaster.

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Judi Love is left bewildered by the prospect of high-fiving Alex Horne, and Bridget Christie has a present for the Taskmaster.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's high season. The cod are bigger, the storms are more powerful, the fishing is more dangerous, but the rewards are even greater.

programme.title: Ice Cold Catch
programme.desc: It's high season. The cod are bigger, the storms are more powerful, the fishing is more dangerous, but the rewards are even greater.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In the battle for winter road supremacy, boss Hugh Roland's plans for VP Express are on the verge of falling apart. Will broken down trucks and ticked off drivers be the straws that break the Polar Bear's back?

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: In the battle for winter road supremacy, boss Hugh Roland's plans for VP Express are on the verge of falling apart. Will broken down trucks and ticked off drivers be the straws that break the Polar Bear's back?

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Stranded over 100km from help Nick and Jo are forced to mount a rescue mission to deliver their freight. The Mackay's monster house move infuriates drivers as they race to make a curfew.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell heads off the grid, delivering a switchroom to a remote gold mine. Brutal weather and winding roads give Jeff Elliot a stressful sprint to markets in Melbourne. Paul McKie takes on remote Cape York.

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his guys get keyed up to restore a colossal 1920s cannonball safe. Can they lock up this protected project or will this massive mission be too heavy to handle?

programme.title: American Restoration
programme.desc: Rick and his guys get keyed up to restore a colossal 1920s cannonball safe. Can they lock up this protected project or will this massive mission be too heavy to handle?

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum has a cow when a seller comes in with a giant collection of figurines from The Simpsons. Will the seller score some d'oh, or walk away Groening? Meanwhile, Corey checks out an old playing card shuffler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum has a cow when a seller comes in with a giant collection of figurines from The Simpsons. Will the seller score some d'oh, or walk away Groening? Meanwhile, Corey checks out an old playing card shuffler.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Stranded over 100km from help Nick and Jo are forced to mount a rescue mission to deliver their freight. The Mackay's monster house move infuriates drivers as they race to make a curfew.

programme.desc: Stranded over 100km from help Nick and Jo are forced to mount a rescue mission to deliver their freight. The Mackay's monster house move infuriates drivers as they race to make a curfew.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Mark Cromwell heads off the grid, delivering a switchroom to a remote gold mine. Brutal weather and winding roads give Jeff Elliot a stressful sprint to markets in Melbourne. Paul McKie takes on remote Cape York.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chum has a cow when a seller comes in with a giant collection of figurines from The Simpsons. Will the seller score some d'oh, or walk away Groening? Meanwhile, Corey checks out an old playing card shuffler.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee gets ready to rumble when a rare wrestling figure comes into the shop. Will he be king of the ring, or get smacked down? Then, a portable craps table is smuggled in.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Chumlee gets ready to rumble when a rare wrestling figure comes into the shop. Will he be king of the ring, or get smacked down? Then, a portable craps table is smuggled in.

programme.title: DMV
programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV
programme.desc: Barb takes the team to North Hollywood to learn from their success, but meeting manager Beau shakes her confidence. Gregg and Vic urge Colette to take a bold risk with Noa.

programme.title: DMV
programme.sub-title: There Is No I In DMV
programme.desc: Barb takes the team to North Hollywood to learn from their success, but meeting manager Beau shakes her confidence. Gregg and Vic urge Colette to take a bold risk with Noa.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: Set in the dreaded DMV office, following quirky minimum-wage employees who make the best of dealing with annoyed customers, finding solace in each other's company.

programme.title: Outback Crystal Hunters
programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.desc: Five crystal-hunting teams set out to confront the extreme conditions of the Australian Outback, hoping to unearth some of the world's rarest and most breathtaking crystals.

programme.title: Ashes: 2017/18 1st Test
programme.desc: The 2017/18 Ashes saw Australian captain Steve Smith shine at the Gabba and Perth, while future captain Pat Cummins made a statement in his first Ashes series. England's Alastair Cook delivers a double century in his final Ashes series.

programme.desc: The 2017/18 Ashes saw Australian captain Steve Smith shine at the Gabba and Perth, while future captain Pat Cummins made a statement in his first Ashes series. England's Alastair Cook delivers a double century in his final Ashes series.

Golf: Australian PGA: Aus Open FR
The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: A spy is on a mission to disprove false accusations made against him by the very government organisation that he works for.

programme.title: Wyatt Earp
programme.desc: The epic story of love and adventure in a lawless land shows the complex portrayal of the most famous lawman in the Wild West.

programme.title: Ghostbusters II
programme.desc: After going out of business, the Ghostbusters reunite to save New York City from a supernatural, slimy doom.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Flying High
programme.desc: An ex-fighter pilot who is afraid to fly is forced to take over the controls of an airliner when the flight crew succumbs to food poisoning.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers review Britain's Got Talent, The Nest, The Yorkshire Vet, Dynamo: Beyond Belief, and BBC News on Boris Johnson and Donald Trump.

programme.title: Gogglebox UK
programme.desc: The Goggleboxers review Killing Eve, Too Hot to Handle off Netflix, The Andrew Marr Show with Michael Gove, Celebrity SAS: Who Dares Wins, and BBC News on face masks.

programme.title: Saved & Remade
programme.desc: Metalsmith Leigh turns an old garden love seat into a spectacular sculpture. Textile designer Emily is inspired by a huge collection of buttons.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Ben's purchase was a big mistake. With rats on the loose, no kitchen, no guttering and an easement through the block, it's going to be a major challenge to get this house fit for sale.

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: Twelve new sewers tackle shape with tie-front blouses, transform circle skirts and create dramatic pleated Made-to-Measure garments.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: The final potters go head-to-head in the pottery grand final, creating striking chandeliers and faceted bowls. Hosted by Siobhan McSweeney, with Judges Keith Brymer Jones and Rich Miller.

programme.title: Inside The Four Seasons
programme.sub-title: Christmas At The Four Seasons: Park Lane
programme.desc: The hotel sparkles for Christmas with festive teas, glittering trees and a giant snowman as staff create a five-star winter wonderland on Park Lane.

programme.title: Extraordinary Escapes With Sandi Toksvig
programme.desc: Sandi Toksvig explores some of the UK's most remote and beautiful holiday destinations, accompanied by some of her favorite women.

programme.title: Phil Spencer: New Zealand's Best Homes
programme.desc: Phil Spencer explores some of New Zealand's most stunning and desirable homes - from luxury mountain retreats to urban architectural wonders.

programme.title: Christmas At Stately Home
programme.desc: Staff, family and 11 very different artists have to pull together to create a Stately Christmas experience like no other. But will it be what their 40,000 loyal visitors are expecting?

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Architect Ariane dreams of a home that blurs inside and out and her methods are as unconventional as her materials. Will she convince her husband it has all been worth it, and stay within a $500,000 budget?

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Port Douglas. Jack and Diana bought this ex-community centre with plans to turn it into two holiday homes. But they never got round to doing it and now all they have is a half renovated home.

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan and team are in West London coming to the aid of widow Sybil. She and husband Harold welcomed foster children and refugees into their home, and without him Sybil is struggling to tackle their garden.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Spanish Job
programme.desc: Alan convinces Amanda to tone down her maximalist instincts for the final bedroom. They opt for an all-white, natural brick design, dubbing it a Balearic balm oasis.

programme.title: Amanda & Alan's Spanish Job
programme.desc: Amanda and Alan go all in for their final room, designing a lavish Moorish-gold bar. In Granada, a visit to a traditional tea house turns into more than they expected, with surprises beyond the tea.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: Caroline Kinsey, burdened by guilt, searches for the son she gave up for adoption over 40 years ago. Paul McFarlane uncovers his late mother's complicated past and learns he wasn't her only child.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Cherie and Bryce need to resolve their complicated living situation now their children have left home. There's one problem - their Brisbane Queenslander is in such a state, nobody wants to buy.

programme.title: Love It Or List It Australia
programme.desc: Michelle & Adrian face an empty nest. She is attached to their ageing seven bedroom home, he wants a fresh start. Neale tries to revive it while Andrew searches for a new place.

programme.title: Inside the Ambulance
programme.desc: Simone and Claire are called to a pensioner who has fallen in her bedroom and become very confused. Dino and Dave go to help a baby whose rocketing temperature has caused concerns that he might have sepsis.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Documenting what happens during a 24-hour period in the accident and emergency department at St George's Hospital in south-west London, one of Britain's busiest hospitals.

programme.title: Helicopter ER
programme.desc: Helicopter rescues by the Yorkshire Air Ambulance.

programme.title: Who Will Love My Doggy?
programme.desc: This series has a simple mission - to find loving new homes for dogs whose previous owners can no longer care for them.

programme.title: Erin Brockovich
programme.desc: A mother who suspects a cover-up over the poisoning of a town's water supply single-handedly takes on a powerful California power company.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Bee Gees: Broken Heart
programme.desc: An exploration of the history of the Bee Gees, featuring revealing interviews with oldest brother Barry Gibb, and archival interviews with the late twin brothers Robin and Maurice.

programme.title: Money Monster
programme.desc: A financial TV host and his producer are put in an extreme situation when an irate investor who has lost everything forcefully takes over their studio.

programme.title: Man on a Ledge
programme.desc: As a police psychologist works to talk down an ex-con who is threatening to jump from a Manhattan hotel rooftop, the biggest diamond heist ever committed is in motion.

programme.title: Captain Phillips
programme.desc: The true story of Captain Richard Phillips and the 2009 hijacking by Somali pirates of the US-flagged MV Maersk Alabama, the first American cargo ship to be hijacked in two hundred years.

programme.title: Christmas Lost and Found
programme.desc: After years of missing family gatherings, event planner Whitney is off to spend Christmas with Grandma Frances. But in an unfortunate turn of events, Whitney throws out a box of precious family ornaments.

programme.title: Christmas on the Vine
programme.desc: A teen discovers the plight of the homeless when a vagrant takes him on a walking tour of Philadelphia landmarks.

programme.title: Roboshark
programme.desc: What starts off as a typical day on the streets of Seattle soon becomes a terrifying bloodbath, when a great white shark devours an alien space probe and ROBOSHARK is born.

programme.title: Godzilla: King of the Monsters
programme.desc: The crypto-zoological agency Monarch faces off against the mighty Godzilla, who collides with Mothra, Rodan, and his ultimate nemesis: the three-headed King Ghidorah.

programme.title: Bastille Day
programme.desc: When a reckless CIA agent and a brilliant pickpocket uncover a large-scale conspiracy, they must work together in order to take down a common enemy.

programme.title: World War Z
programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Robin Hood (2010)
programme.desc: In an age of oppression and shameless tyranny, an outlaw becomes the unlikely hero that saves a nation and inspires generations to fight for freedom.

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in the jungle when a tough bounty hunter is sent deep into the Amazon to bring back his boss' son - a job that's not gonna be as easy!

programme.title: Welcome to the Jungle
programme.desc: Get ready to rumble in the jungle when a tough bounty hunter is sent deep into the Amazon to bring back his boss' son - a job that's not gonna be as easy!

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: As cryptocurrency becomes central to Anarchapulco, Paul Propert and Jason Henza head south while Lily and John launch their own anarchist gathering.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: Growing conflicts within the Anarchapulco community over power, wealth, and more, escalate to potentially dangerous levels.

programme.title: El Accidente
programme.desc: The couple, alongside their son, plan to go into witness protection. Joao won't let them go so easily.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did Jim Morrison's dad start Vietnam? How did AC/DC's Bon Scott really die? Did Lady Gaga expose an underground dognapping ring?

programme.title: Falco
programme.desc: Juan Pablo gets into Falco's room. He discovers the files against him and takes them. The detectives take a risk and find the young man kidnapped. They destroy the group, Fauna.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When four masked men attempt to rob the Brokenwood Savings Bank, it's up to Mike and the team to determine which one of them pulled the trigger and killed the bank manager.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike, Kristin and the team investigate the murder of a farmers' market owner who staggers into the crowd with a garden implement fatally embedded in her back.

programme.title: John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
John Wayne Gacy: Devil in Disguise
The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: When four masked men attempt to rob the Brokenwood Savings Bank, it's up to Mike and the team to determine which one of them pulled the trigger and killed the bank manager.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Mike, Kristin and the team investigate the murder of a farmers' market owner who staggers into the crowd with a garden implement fatally embedded in her back.

programme.title: Julie & Julia
programme.desc: A lipsmacking delight about cooking legend Julia Child and how she inspired a frustrated office worker with a recipe for a new life.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Matchmaker Mysteries: A Fatal Romance
programme.desc: When a romance writer is murdered, matchmaker Angie Dove and Detective Kyle Cooper must read between the lines to find the killer.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, a young woman whose fiance suddenly dies finds comfort with his caring friends, but catches herself falling for the irresponsible playboy of the group.

programme.title: Catch and Release
programme.desc: In this romantic comedy, a young woman whose fiance suddenly dies finds comfort with his caring friends, but catches herself falling for the irresponsible playboy of the group.

programme.title: Sing
programme.desc: Buster Moon is a dapper koala who presides over a once grand theatre that has fallen on hard times. Buster is an eternal optimist, and maybe a bit of a scoundrel, who loves his theatre above all and will do anything to preserve it. Now facing the crumbling of his life's ambition, he has one final chance to restore his fading jewel to its former glory by producing the world's greatest singing competition.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 3
programme.desc: When Po's long-lost panda father suddenly reappears, the reunited duo travels to a secret panda paradise to meet scores of hilarious new panda characters. When the supernatural villain Kai begins to sweep across China defeating all the kung fu masters, Po must do the impossible: learn to train a village full of his fun-loving, clumsy brethren to become the ultimate band of kung fu pandas.

programme.title: Trolls
programme.desc: When Troll Village is invaded by the Bergens, two mismatched trolls must try and tolerate each other as they set out on a journey to rescue their friends.

programme.title: Rise of the Guardians
programme.desc: When an evil spirit known as Pitch lays down the gauntlet to take over the world, the immortal Guardians must join forces for the first time to protect the hopes, beliefs, and imagination of children all over the world.

programme.title: Early Man
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of time when prehistoric creatures roamed the earth, Early Man tells the story of courageous caveman Dug and his sidekick Hognob who, together with their fearless new friend Goona, must unite their Stone Age Tribe against the mighty Bronze Age enemy, Lord Nooth.

programme.title: The Prince of Egypt
programme.desc: This is the extraordinary tale of two brothers, one born of royal blood, one an orphan with a secret past. Their final confrontation will forever change their lives - and the world.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania 2
programme.desc: Worried that his half-vampire grandson isn't showing signs of being a vampire, Dracula enlists his friends to put him through 'monster-in-training' boot camp.

programme.title: Storks
programme.desc: Storks deliver babies or at least they used to. Now they deliver packages for a global internet retail giant. Junior, the company's top delivery stork, is about to be promoted when he accidentally activates the Baby Making Machine, producing an adorable and wholly unauthorised baby girl.

programme.title: Monsters Vs Aliens
programme.desc: Follows the adventures of BOB, Link, Dr Cockroach, and Susan as they learn to adapt to a new world and work side-by-side.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Homecoming
programme.desc: A young Peter Parker/Spider-Man begins to navigate his new-found identity as the web-slinging superhero. Thrilled by his experience with the Avengers, Peter returns home where he lives with his Aunt May, under the watchful eye of his new mentor, Tony Stark. Peter tries to fall back into his normal daily routine - distracted by thoughts of proving himself to be more than just your friendly neighbourhood Spider-Man. But when the Vulture emerges as a new villain, everything that Peter holds most important will be threatened.

programme.title: Spider-Man: No Way Home
programme.desc: With Spider-Man's identity now revealed, Peter asks Doctor Strange for help. When a spell goes wrong, dangerous foes from other worlds start to appear, forcing Peter to discover what it truly means to be Spider-Man.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Far From Home
programme.desc: Our friendly neighbourhood Super Hero decides to join his best friends Ned, MJ, and the rest of the gang on a European vacation. However, Peter's plan to leave super heroics behind for a few weeks are quickly scrapped when he begrudgingly agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent!

programme.title: Sinbad: Legend of the Seven Seas
programme.desc: It's high-seas adventure when legendary swashbuckler Sinbad, his loyal pooch Spike, and the daring Princess Marina face off against the trickster Goddess of Chaos and her mischievous monsters.

programme.title: Despicable Me 4
programme.desc: Gru welcomes a new member to the family, Gru Jr, who's intent on tormenting his dad. However, their peaceful existence soon comes crashing down, when criminal mastermind Maxime Le Mal escapes from prison.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Love & Rage: Munroe Bergdorf
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Munroe Bergdorf - author, model, and leading transgender activist.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Transformers One
programme.desc: The untold origin story of Optimus Prime and Megatron, better known as sworn enemies, but who once were friends bonded like brothers.

programme.title: Mack & Rita
programme.desc: Wakes up after being struck by lightning in a sound bath regression pod to find she has magically transformed into her 70-year-old self.
